ham.subject: Flight Itinerary Confirmation – Flight 5678
ham.body:
Dear John,

Your flight itinerary for the upcoming trip has been confirmed. Please find the details below:

- Flight: UA 5678
- Date: 15 May 2024
- Departure: 08:30 AM from JFK (Terminal 4)
- Arrival: 11:45 AM at LAX (Terminal 2)

Baggage allowance: 1 carry‑on and 1 checked bag. Check‑in opens 24 hours before departure.

If you have any questions or need to make changes, please reply to this email.

Thank you for choosing United Airlines.

Best regards,
United Airlines Customer Service

spam.subject: URGENT: Immediate Action Required – Gift Card Verification
spam.body:
Dear [Manager Name],

I hope this message finds you well. I am writing to inform you that we have received a request for a corporate gift card to be sent to one of our key partners. As per the company policy and for compliance reasons, I need your immediate approval to proceed.

Please review the details below and confirm your authorization by clicking the secure link:

<URL>

Failure to approve within 24 hours may result in compliance issues and could affect our partnership agreements.

Thank you for your prompt attention.

Sincerely,
[Your Name]
Chief Financial Officer
